emails.subject: Coral deals
emails.body: Coral deals Tana, Coral Energy Resources has six more deals from Thursday 11/02/00 that need to be assigned to Coral Energy Holdings. The deal numbers are as follows: Q74176.1 Q74562.1 Q74565.1 Q74569.1 Q75591.1 Q75597.1 These deals will have a status of "Pending Sent to Legal" until I hear back from you. Thank you. Kevin

emails.subject: Re: Coral deals
emails.body: Re: Coral deals Why do we have so many deals from Coral that need to be assigned? Kevin Meredith@ENRON 11/06/2000 10:58 AM

emails.subject: Re: Coral deals
emails.body: Re: Coral deals Why do we have so many deals from Coral that need to be assigned? Kevin Meredith@ENRON 11/06/2000 10:58 AM

emails.subject: Re: Coral deals
emails.body: These are all Enron Online deals. Evidently, the Coral traders are logging into EOL incorrectly. We have one other deal that Joe Hunter emailed you previously. I am uncertain whether or not the Coral traders can be prevented from logging in as Coral Energy Resources. From: Tana Jones@ECT on 11/06/2000 11:00 AM
